text.data-narration: Web data refers to the vast amount of data available on the World Wide Web, including text, images, videos, and other multimedia content. This data can be accessed and retrieved through various web technologies and search engines.

svg.text: Web data refers to the vast amount of data available on the World Wide Web, including text, images, videos, and other multimedia content. This data can be accessed and retrieved through various web technologies and search engines.

text.data-narration: Text data includes various types of content, such as web pages, blog posts, social media posts, and reviews. Image data includes various types of visual content, such as images, videos, and graphs. Audio data includes various types of sound content, such as music, voice recordings, and podcasts.

svg.text: Text data includes various types of content, such as web pages, blog posts, social media posts, and reviews. Image data includes various types of visual content, such as images, videos, and graphs. Audio data includes various types of sound content, such as music, voice recordings, and podcasts.

text.data-narration: Web pages are the primary source of web data. They can be crawled and indexed by search engines to make their content available to users. APIs and web services provide access to web data through programming interfaces.

svg.text: Web pages are the primary source of web data. They can be crawled and indexed by search engines to make their content available to users. APIs and web services provide access to web data through programming interfaces.
